claim_boundary: The graph construction and adjacency list are attributed to Jorgensen. The distance characteristic polynomial and WOW-284 equality are project-side exact computations.

graph6.encoding: NetworkX graph6 without the >>graph6<< header, fixed labels 0..95.

normalized_adjacency.normalization: Rows 0 through 95; neighbors sorted increasingly; one ASCII space around the colon and after the opening brace; comma-space separators; LF ending.

published_construction.author: Leif K. Jorgensen
published_construction.title: Girth 5 Graphs from Relative Difference Sets

source_snapshot.normalization: Human-readable text displayed by the source page, preserved in row order; line endings normalized to LF. This is a text snapshot, not raw HTML bytes.
